name: validator-ai-mcp
description: > **By [MEOK AI Labs](https://meok.ai)** — Validate JSON against schemas, check email deliverability, verify URLs, assess data quality, and val

tools.name: validate_json
tools.description: Validate JSON string, optionally against a JSON Schema. Schema as JSON string.

tools.name: validate_email
tools.description: Validate email format, domain structure, and check for disposable addresses.

tools.name: validate_url
tools.description: Validate URL format, structure, and security characteristics.

tools.name: validate_data_quality
tools.description: Check a JSON dataset for quality issues: nulls, duplicates, type consistency, outliers. Pass data as JSON array of objects.

tools.name: validate_api_response
tools.description: Validate an API response body and structure. Required fields as comma-separated string.
